REIS [IA] Brand DNA Gallery
01 / 15
Design Intelligence

Brand DNA

Fifteen luxury houses decoded through their visual grammar — color, typography, motion, and component decisions rendered in their own design language.

FashionJewelryBeautyFragranceAutomotiveHospitalityLuxury Goods
Scroll
01 / 15
Fashion Est. 1910
Allure

CHANEL

chanel.com ↗

Absolute monochrome discipline. Zero border-radius. Ultra-light weight 200 display type communicates power through restraint.

HAUTE COUTURE FASHION FINE JEWELRY FRAGRANCE
Color Palette
Noir
#000000
Charbon
#1D1D1D
Gris
#767676
Perle
#D8D8D8
Blanc
#FFFFFF
Signature Accent
#000000
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
ABChanel — Display — 58px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
ABChanel Corpo — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME
Navigation — 11px / 0.15em
CTA / Button
DISCOVER
LEARN MORE
Radius
0px
Size
11px
Tracking
0.15em
Motion Timing
0.54s
Default Transition Duration
Micro
0.2s
Default
0.54s
Reveal
0.81s
Signature Element
Allure

Zero chromatic color. The entire site runs on black, white, and gray — no accent color exists. The interlocking CC mark is the only decorative form in a system built on typographic purity.

Form Elements

Alexandra Dubois

Every detail carries intention. The restraint of luxury is never absence — it is the presence of only what matters.

02 / 15
Fashion Est. 1837
Craft

Hermes

hermes.com ↗

Warm parchment surfaces with bold orange accent signaling craft and warmth. Garamond display creates editorial High-Low tension.

WOMEN MEN HOME EQUESTRIAN
Color Palette
Orange Hermes
#F6811E
Noir
#000000
Parchemin
#F6F1EB
Creme
#FCF7F1
Gris Etain
#696969
Signature Accent
#F6811E
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
EB Garamond — Display — 34px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Manrope — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME
Navigation — 12px / 0.08em
CTA / Button

Tracking
0.10em
Motion Timing
0.4s
Default Transition Duration
Micro
0.2s
Default
0.4s
Reveal
0.6000000000000001s
Signature Element
Craft

Orange as identity. Unlike luxury peers who use monochrome + subtle accent, Hermes makes orange (#F6811E) a dominant force — in nav bars, CTAs, hover states, and section dividers. The parchment background (#F6F1EB) feels like aged craft paper.

03 / 15
Jewelry Est. 1837
Brilliance

Tiffany & Co.

tiffany.com ↗

Iconic Tiffany Blue dominates navigation and CTA states while the system stays strictly monochrome. Sterling serif anchors the hierarchy.

JEWELRY ENGAGEMENT GIFTS HIGH JEWELRY
Color Palette
Tiffany Blue
#81D8D0
Onyx
#000000
Midnight
#002B49
Platinum
#E6E6E6
Diamond
#FFFFFF
Signature Accent
#81D8D0
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Sterling Display — Display — 42px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Santral — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME

CTA / Button

Tracking
0.12em
Motion Timing
0.5s
Default Transition Duration
Micro
0.2s
Default
0.5s
Reveal
0.75s
Signature Element
Brilliance

Pantone 1837 (Tiffany Blue) is trademarked. It appears in the nav bar background, CTA hover states, and the iconic little blue box — never as a surface fill. The number 1837 (founding year) doubles as the Pantone reference.

04 / 15
Fashion Est. 1946
Couture

Dior

dior.com ↗

Pure black-and-white with gold accent reserved for brand marks. Hero type at 72px with tight tracking. 160px section padding enforces maximum negative space.

FASHION COUTURE BEAUTY MAISON DIOR

Or

Aa Bb Cc
Dior Serif — Display — 72px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Helvetica Neue — Body

0.6s

0.8999999999999999s
Signature Element
Couture

The widest letter-spacing in luxury digital. Navigation at 0.20em tracking creates architectural rhythm. Gold (#C4A35A) is sacred — reserved exclusively for the DIOR wordmark and editorial accents, never for UI elements.

05 / 15
Jewelry Est. 1847
Eternel

Cartier

cartier.com ↗

Warm-cream surfaces anchor a system where Cartier Red appears sparingly as a brand signal. Ultra-wide letter-spacing on metadata. Dramatic deceleration on reveals.

HIGH JEWELRY WATCHES LOVE PANTHERE
Color Palette
Rouge Cartier
#A5182A
Onyx
#000000
Bordeaux
#6B0F1A
Ivoire
#FAF7F2
Diamant
#FFFFFF
Signature Accent
#A5182A
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Cartier Serif — Display — 64px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
CartierSans — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME
Navigation — 11px / 0.20em
CTA / Button

0px

11px
Tracking
0.15em
Motion Timing
0.7s
Default Transition Duration
Micro
0.2s
Default
0.7s
Reveal
1.0499999999999998s
Signature Element
Eternel

Warm foundation. While competitors default to pure white or black, Cartier builds on cream (#FAF7F2) — the warmth of old ivory. The 0.7s transition duration with dramatic deceleration makes every reveal feel like opening a jewelry box.

Form Elements

06 / 15
Fashion Est. 1854
Voyage

Louis Vuitton

louisvuitton.com ↗

Art meets commerce. Warm off-white with LV Brown as sole accent. Hero type at 80px — the largest in the collection. Cinematic 1.5s cross-fades define the slowest motion palette.

WOMEN MEN ART OF LIVING WORLD OF LV
Color Palette
Noir
#000000
Monogram
#6B4226
Cuir
#C19A6B
Ivoire
#F9F6F1
Blanc
#FFFFFF
Signature Accent
#6B4226
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
LouisVuitton Serif — Display — 80px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Neue Helvetica — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME
Navigation — 11px / 0.12em
CTA / Button
DISCOVER
LEARN MORE

0px
Size
11px
Tracking
0.12em
Motion Timing
1.5s
Default Transition Duration
Micro
0.2s
Default
1.5s
Reveal
2.25s
Signature Element
Voyage

Cinematic pace. At 1.5s, LV has the slowest default transition in luxury digital. Hero type at 80px is the largest scale. The 7.3:1 ratio between hero (80px) and nav (11px) creates the most extreme typographic contrast in the library.

Form Elements

07 / 15
Fashion Est. 1966
Intrecciato

Bottega Veneta

bottegaveneta.com ↗

Unexpected Bottega Green cuts through strict monochrome as the single accent. Full-serif stack at every level. Zero border-radius. Snappier motion than luxury peers.

WOMEN MEN GIFTS THE JOURNAL
Color Palette
Nero
#000000
Carbone
#272727
Verde Bottega
#009539
Grigio
#767676
Perla
#F1F3F2
Signature Accent
#009539
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Bottega Veneta Serif — Display — 57px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Bottega Veneta Bold — Body

0.2s

Micro
0.2s
Default
0.2s
Reveal
0.30000000000000004s
Signature Element
Intrecciato

Verde Bottega (#009539) is the rebel accent. In a world of gold, red, and blue luxury accents, Bottega chose green — appearing on selection indicators, success states, and hover treatments. At 0.2s, it also has the fastest transitions in the luxury set.

08 / 15
Fashion Est. 1978
Solomeo

Brunello Cucinelli

brunellocucinelli.com ↗

Warm earthy cashmere grays reflect Umbrian craft philosophy. IvyPresto at 7rem with weight 300 creates the most generous display scale. Understated text-links over buttons.

WOMAN MAN LIFESTYLE SOLOMEO
Color Palette
Grafite
#262626
Cashmere
#8D8277
Tartufo
#71685F
Lino
#F1F0EF
Seta
#F5F5F5
Signature Accent
#8D8277
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
IvyPresto — Display — 112px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
GT Eesti — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME

Micro
0.2s
Default
0.22s
Reveal
0.33s
Signature Element
Solomeo

No buttons. Brunello Cucinelli avoids traditional button components — all interactions use text-links with subtle underlines. Display type at 112px (7rem) is the largest in the entire collection, creating breathing room that mirrors the Umbrian hilltop of Solomeo.

Form Elements

09 / 15
Beauty Est. 1987
Reverence

Aesop

aesop.com ↗

Forest-green and parchment palette anchors the most coherent single-typeface system in luxury. Optima reserved exclusively for editorial pull-quotes. Studied, confident restraint.

SKIN CARE BODY & HAND HOME KITS & TRAVEL
Color Palette
Forest
#333D2C
Carbon
#000000
Parchment
#FFFEF2
Bark
#696158
Stone
#D4CFC4
Signature Accent
#333D2C
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Suisse Intl — Display — 56px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Suisse Intl — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME
Navigation — 12px / 0.05em
CTA / Button
DISCOVER
LEARN MORE

0px
Size
12px
Tracking
0.08em
Motion Timing
0.4s
Default Transition Duration
Micro
0.2s
Default
0.4s
Reveal
0.6000000000000001s
Signature Element
Reverence

One font for everything. Aesop is the only luxury brand running a single-typeface system (Suisse Intl) across all roles — display, body, nav, metadata. Optima appears exclusively in editorial pull-quotes, creating a moment of surprise in an otherwise uniform typographic landscape.

Form Elements

10 / 15
Fragrance Est. 1961
Fleur

Diptyque

diptyqueparis.com ↗

Custom proprietary serif with wide letter-spacing carries the Parisian botanical voice. Dark green appears in seasonal collections. No drop shadows — radial-gradient overlays for product glow.

FRAGRANCES CANDLES BODY CARE MAISON
Color Palette
Encre
#000000
Vert Jardin
#2D4A3E
Papier
#F5F0E8
Cire
#FAF7F2
Lin

#2D4A3E
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Diptyque Saint-Germain — Display — 64px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
System sans-serif — Body

0.2s

0.35s

0.5249999999999999s
Signature Element
Fleur

Radial-gradient product glow. Instead of box-shadows, Diptyque uses radial-gradient overlays behind candle and fragrance products, simulating the warm light of a lit candle. The seasonal dark green (#2D4A3E) rotates with collections — a rare temporal accent.

11 / 15
Automotive Est. 1904
Bespoke

Rolls-Royce

rolls-roycemotorcars.com ↗

The only dark-mode-native brand. Anthracite surfaces with Purple Spirit as nobility signal. 0.15em tracking on display. Stately 1.0s and cinematic 1.5s transitions define the slowest motion palette.

MODELS BESPOKE OWNERSHIP PROVENANCE
Color Palette
Midnight
#0D0D0D
Anthracite
#1A1A1A
Purple Spirit
#6B2D8B
Gold
#C4A265
Spirit
#FFFFFF
Signature Accent
#6B2D8B
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Riviera Nights — Display — 80px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
System sans-serif — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME

0.2s
Default
1.0s
Reveal
1.5s
Signature Element
Bespoke

Purple Spirit (#6B2D8B). The only luxury brand using purple as its signature accent — a conscious choice to signal nobility and exclusivity. Paired with the stateliest transitions (1.0-1.5s), every interaction feels like a Phantom gliding to a stop.

12 / 15
Hospitality Est. 1988
Sanctuary

Aman

aman.com ↗

Sand-warm surfaces and warm tan accent define the most quietly luxurious hospitality brand. Lyon Display weight 300 with Whitney SSm creates a classic High-Low pairing. 120px section padding enforces meditative pace.

DESTINATIONS RESIDENCES JANU EXPERIENCES
Color Palette
Obsidian
#000000
Basalt
#313131
Sand
#B38B5B
Linen
#F3EEE7

#B38B5B
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Lyon Display — Display — 82px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Whitney SSm — Body

Micro
0.2s
Default
0.2s

0.30000000000000004s
Signature Element
Sanctuary

Meditative pace. Section padding at 120px — double the SaaS standard — creates breathing room that mirrors the spatial generosity of Aman resorts. The sand-warm background (#F3EEE7) evokes the linen textures of Southeast Asian hospitality.

13 / 15
Automotive Est. 1931
Turbo

Porsche

porsche.com ↗

Engineering precision meets dark-mode brutalism. Porsche Red appears only as a punctuation mark — a single accent in an otherwise pure monochrome system. Sans-serif only, zero ornamentation.

MODELS EXPERIENCE MOTORSPORT PORSCHE DESIGN
Color Palette
Schwarz
#000000
Weiss
#FFFFFF
Porsche Red
#D5001C
Anthrazit
#313639
Silber
#E3E4E5
Signature Accent
#D5001C
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Porsche Next — Display — 72px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Porsche Next — Body
WOMEN MEN HOME

CTA / Button

Size
14px
Tracking
0.04em
Motion Timing
0.4s
Default Transition Duration
Micro
0.2s
Default
0.4s
Reveal
0.6000000000000001s
Signature Element
Turbo

The largest nav font in luxury. At 14px with minimal 0.02em tracking, Porsche rejects the whisper-thin 11px luxury standard. This is engineering confidence — the typography equivalent of a flat-six engine note. Porsche Red (#D5001C) appears only once per viewport.

14 / 15
Automotive Est. 1947
Velocita

Ferrari

ferrari.com ↗

Rosso Corsa on black — the most color-identified brand in luxury automotive. Cinematic full-bleed vehicle photography dominates. Yellow shield accent reserved for the Cavallino Rampante. Sans-serif confidence throughout.

RANGE RACING ESPORTS LIFESTYLE
Color Palette
Nero
#000000
Rosso Corsa
#DC0000
Giallo Modena
#FFCC00
Carbonio
#1C1C1C
Bianco
#FFFFFF
Signature Accent
#DC0000
Typography System
Aa Bb Cc
Ferrari Sans — Display — 80px
The essence of luxury is restraint in service of beauty. Every surface, every transition, every typographic choice carries intention.
Ferrari Sans — Body

0.5s

0.75s
Signature Element
Velocita

Two-accent system. Ferrari is the only brand using two signature colors — Rosso Corsa (#DC0000) for primary actions and Giallo Modena (#FFCC00) for the shield and heritage moments. The yellow is sacred: it only appears near the Cavallino Rampante.

15 / 15
Luxury Goods Est. 1906
Meisterstuck

Montblanc

montblanc.com ↗

German precision wrapped in French luxury. Black and Heritage Gold define the wordmark. The Montblanc star emblem signals craftsmanship since 1906. Product-as-art photography with studio lighting on dark surfaces.

WRITING WATCHES LEATHER FINE JEWELRY

Signature Element
Meisterstuck

The six-pointed star. Inspired by Mont Blanc peak covered in snow, the white star emblem has represented the pinnacle of craftsmanship since 1906. Heritage Gold (#C8A96E) connects writing instruments to the gold nib tradition — warmth on an otherwise pure-black stage.

SUBHEAD — 24px
Every detail carries intention. The restraint of luxury is never absence — it is the presence of only what matters.
